description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single deploy stage containing a pages job. The pages job runs the script commands: mkdir .public, cp -r * .public, and mv .public public. It collects the public directory as an artifact (paths: public) and is configured to run only for the special "pages" trigger. No custom Docker image or services are defined, so it uses the default runner image. Publish the artifact to GitLab Pages.
